concepts.label: begin (happening X begins at time T)
end (happening X ends at time T)
friend (X is a friend of Y)
maker of (X is the maker of Y)
part of (X is part of Y)
chip (act of breaking off a small piece)
decadent (person in moral or artistic decline)
equality (X and Y are on a par)
peer (X is a peer of Y)
service (delivery of a writ or summons)

gate_precedence.gate_pool: matching/resolution runs over the retention-filtered gate pool (gloss + parseable kot-ast/1 + WN dictionary gloss + >=1 trigger), the screen's frozen counting universe; concepts outside it never gate (in_gate_pool per concept below)
gate_precedence.multi_concept_tag: items with >1 distinct resolved concept are tagged 'multi-concept' (descriptive subgroup) [DES §R4]
gate_precedence.overlap: longest trigger match, then earliest span start, then lowest concept index [DES §R4]

kernel_source.join: synset-deduped (kernel-v1 preferred on collision); records without a synset alignment are outside the universe (WordNet-surface expansion rule)
kernel_source.reading: OP-3 SUPERSEDED: the REVISION-6 maintainer-approved geometry (2026-07-15) fixes the universe to the joined v0+v1 records of the askability screen; the 2026-07-13 kernel-v0-only reading (C<=54) is void

matching_rule: case-insensitive whole-word regex match (\b<phrase>\b, phrases matched with literal single spaces) of every trigger phrase against the frozen template text; overlap resolution per DES §R4: longest match, then earliest span start, then lowest concept index; guard items match NOTHING anywhere in the template
name: f1k-trigger-map-v1
recipe: registry/experiments/f1k.json pins.corpus_hashes[f1k-trigger-map-v1] + design §2.3 (G-lex) / §R4 (gate precedence) / §R3.2, at the REVISION-6 universe: the kernel-v0 + kernel-v1 synset-deduped join of the frozen askability screen (poc/f1k-askability/screen.py load_kernel_records + [BC] build_triggers)
supersedes: supersedes the 2026-07-13 designer-23 kernel-v0-only pass (49 clusters, n=1440) — REVISION-6 frozen geometry C=96 / n_test=1573, maintainer-approved 2026-07-15

wordnet_source.corpus: lexical-wn31 (in-repo WN3.1 source dict + alignment-kernel-v0.json, kot-lex-align/1; kernel-v1 records carry their synset inline)
wordnet_source.expansion: aligned synset lemmas + derivationally-related ('+' pointer) word lemmas, lowercased, underscores to spaces, syntactic markers stripped
